series_metadata.series_description: The purpose of these files is to provide ready reference and information of current materials. A) File contains contracts and other supporting documents such as bids, engineers estimates, contractors estimates, material lists, etc., pertaining to preparation of capital developments. B) Original or copy in Planning & Design Office. Copy on file in Director's or Department of Engineers Office.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: outdated, superseded, or obsolete and
